If you notice an issue, please consider making an edit, starting a discussion on the article's talk page, or reaching out via the [Arknights Terra Wiki Discord](https://discord.gg/2eXU4KHYpB). # Operator gallery: Deepcolor From Arknights Terra Wiki < [Deepcolor](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor "Deepcolor") [Jump to navigation](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery#mw-head) [Jump to search](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery#searchInput) | | | | | | | | | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor "Deepcolor") | [File](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/File "Deepcolor/File") | [Story](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Story "Deepcolor/Story") | [Overview](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Overview "Deepcolor/Overview") | [Dialogue](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Dialogue "Deepcolor/Dialogue") | Gallery | [Trivia](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Trivia "Deepcolor/Trivia") | ## Contents - [1Skins](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery#Skins) - [2Outfits](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery#Outfits) - [3Sprites](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery#Sprites) - [4Miscellaneous](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery#Miscellaneous) - [4.1Promotional material](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery#Promotional_material) - [4.2Concept art](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery#Concept_art) ## Skins\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery?action=edit§ion=1 "Edit section: Skins")\] | Base | | --- | | ![Deepcolor.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Deepcolor.png?fd3bd3) | An outfit commonly worn by [Operators](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator").
While not as practical as a uniform, it's what they find most comfortable. | | Elite 2 | | --- | | ![Deepcolor Elite 2.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Deepcolor_Elite_2.png?72d254) | An outfit that has been improved after the [Operator](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Operator "Operator")'s [Promotion](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Promotion "Promotion").
Custom-made to suit each Operator's experiences and needs, these outfits are designed to provide them maximum flexibility on any battlefield. Furthermore, this is all done without compromising the comfort that they've come to expect. | ## Outfits\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery?action=edit§ion=2 "Edit section: Outfits")\] | Melodic Portrayal | | --- | | ![Deepcolor Skin 1.png](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/Deepcolor_Skin_1.png?9d13f6) | One of Deepcolor's casual outfits.
_Deepcolor describes epic scenes while fiddling with the strange terminal. Gradually, you begin to see visions of a silhouette fighting strange foes. You do not know if this came from reality, or fiction._
Cambrian 1099 New Winter Collection/Melodic Portrayal. Stylishly loose-fitting, comfortable and mobile. The waterproof surface keeps it from being stained by paint, making it the ideal outfit for artists.
**How to obtain:**
- [A Death in Chunfen](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/A_Death_in_Chunfen "A Death in Chunfen") (Yishan Temple, 350 [![Wellbeing Charm](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Wellbeing_Charm.png/16px-Wellbeing_Charm.png?6c7711)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Wellbeing_Charm "Wellbeing Charm"))
- [Record Restoration](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Record_Restoration "Record Restoration") (since [A Kazdelian Rescue](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/A_Kazdelian_Rescue "A Kazdelian Rescue")) | ## Sprites\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery?action=edit§ion=3 "Edit section: Sprites")\] - Deepcolor's Base Sprite - Deepcolor's _Melodic Portrayal_ Outfit Sprite ## Miscellaneous\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery?action=edit§ion=4 "Edit section: Miscellaneous")\] ### Promotional material\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery?action=edit§ion=5 "Edit section: Promotional material")\] - [![Deepcolor's operator introduction](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Deepcolor_operator_introduction.png/200px-Deepcolor_operator_introduction.png?8a3936)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Deepcolor_operator_introduction.png "Deepcolor's operator introduction") Deepcolor's operator introduction ### Concept art\[ [edit](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Deepcolor/Gallery?action=edit§ion=6 "Edit section: Concept art")\] - [![Deepcolor's concept art from Arknights Official Artworks RESET Vol. 1.](https://arknights.wiki.gg/images/thumb/Deepcolor_Concept_Art.png/141px-Deepcolor_Concept_Art.png?591967)](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/File:Deepcolor_Concept_Art.png "Deepcolor's concept art from Arknights Official Artworks RESET Vol. 1.") Deepcolor's concept art from _[Arknights Official Artworks RESET Vol. 1](https://arknights.wiki.gg/wiki/Arknights_Official_Artworks "Arknights Official Artworks")_.
